info.name: HT-Cash-DA-CLM-adaptive-time-1
info.description:
HT v18 — $4M Pool · 1 CLM (Buy-and-Hold) · NO MIRROR · Derive Pattern from Stablecoin4

  WHAT CHANGED FROM v17 (hybrid-treasury-2):
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Removed: ad_btc01_spot_mirror (AllocationDriftModel mirror)
  Removed: Runtime dollar-payoff cache coupling between CLM and CASH-PAM

  Added: PHASE 0 asset-only ACTUS run (stablecoin4 derive pattern)
  Added: JS post-processing to capture BTC sell PP events + T-bill MD events
  Added: DERIVED HT_CASH_BALANCE Reference Index (from ACTUS events, NOT hardcoded)
  Added: scf_btc_proceeds ScheduledCashFlowModel (schedule derived from Phase 0)

  Kept: ad_btc01_spot (AllocationDriftModel on BTC CLM, NO mirror)
  Kept: scf_tbill_flows (ScheduledCashFlowModel for T-bill maturity inflows)
  Kept: lb_tr01 (LiquidityBufferModel)
  Kept: Same pool structure, BTC price path, contracts, allocation bands

  DESIGN PATTERN (from Stables-HT-ISS-HOL-time-daily-1-fix1):
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Phase 0: Run asset contracts through ACTUS FIRST (BTC CLM + 3 T-bills)
           JS captures PP sell events from CLM + MD events from T-bills
           DERIVES cash timeline and BTC sell schedule from actual ACTUS output
  Phase 1: Register DERIVED data as Reference Indexes + ScheduledCashFlowModel
  Phase 2: Create full scenario with derived + market data
  Phase 3: Run full 5-contract simulation
           CASH-PAM receives BTC sell proceeds via ScheduledCashFlowModel
           (NOT via mirror model — contracts are decoupled)

  WHY: The mirror model couples BTC CLM and CASH-PAM via an in-memory
  HashMap at runtime. The derive pattern decouples them: BTC sells are
  captured in Phase 0 and routed to CASH-PAM as an explicit schedule.
  This is more auditable, doesn't require contract ordering, and follows
  the proven stablecoin4 architecture.

  POOL SIZING (same as v17):
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Constraint: 20 BTC × $50,000 / NAV = 0.25 (target allocation at deployment)
    NAV = 20 × $50,000 / 0.25 = $4,000,000
    nonBTC_base = $4,000,000 - $1,000,000 = $3,000,000
    T-Bills (same ladder) = $988,113
    Cash residual = $3,000,000 - $988,113 = $2,011,887
    Pool = $1,000,000 (CLM) + $988,113 (T-Bills) + $2,011,887 (cash) = $4,000,000

  BREACH THRESHOLD:
  20 × P / (20 × P + 3,000,000) > 0.30  →  P > $64,286
  First price above this: $65,000 (Apr-15)

  ALLOCATION STORY (1 CLM, 20 BTC, useFixedQuantity=true):
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Feb-28  $49,500   0 BTC    0.0%    CASH-PAM IED. Pool $4M established.
  Mar-01  $50,000  20 BTC   25.0%   CLM IED: -$1M deployed → 20 BTC.
  Mar-15  $55,000  20 BTC   26.8%   Rising. In band [20%-30%].
  Mar-31  $60,000  20 BTC   28.6%   Approaching ceiling.
  Apr-15  $65,000  20 BTC   30.2%   BREACH (> 30% max)
    → Phase 0 captures: ad_btc01_spot SELL ~3.46 BTC × $65K ≈ $225,000
    → Phase 1 registers: scf_btc_proceeds {Apr-15, -$225K}
    → Phase 3: CASH-PAM receives PP +$225K via ScheduledCashFlowModel
  Apr-30  $70,000  16.54 BTC  26.8%   No breach.
  May-15  $74,000  16.54 BTC  28.7%   Approaching. In band.
  May-31  $78,000  16.54 BTC  30.1%   BREACH again (> 30% max)
    → Phase 0 captures: ad_btc01_spot SELL ~2.79 BTC × $78K ≈ $217,500
    → Phase 1 registers: scf_btc_proceeds {May-31, -$217.5K}
    → Phase 3: CASH-PAM receives PP +$217.5K via ScheduledCashFlowModel
  Jun-01  $75,000  13.75 BTC   —      TBILL-3mo-400K matures → +$400,000
  Jun-30  $90,000  13.75 BTC  29.2%   Near ceiling but no breach.
  Jul-01  $89,000  13.75 BTC   —      TBILL-4mo-350K matures → +$350,000
  Aug-01  $77,000  13.75 BTC   —      TBILL-5mo-250K matures → +$250,000
  Aug-31  $65,000  13.75 BTC  23.0%   All contracts settle.

  DERIVED HT_CASH_BALANCE (from Phase 0 ACTUS events, NOT hardcoded):
  ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  Mar-01  $2,011,887  (initial: $4M - $1M CLM - $988K T-bills)
  Apr-15  $2,236,887  (+$225K BTC sell proceeds from Phase 0 PP capture)
  May-31  $2,454,387  (+$217.5K BTC sell proceeds from Phase 0 PP capture)
  Jun-01  $2,854,387  (+$400K T-bill 3mo maturity from Phase 0 MD capture)
  Jul-01  $3,204,387  (+$350K T-bill 4mo maturity from Phase 0 MD capture)
  Aug-01  $3,454,387  (+$250K T-bill 5mo maturity from Phase 0 MD capture)

  RESEARCH REFERENCES:
  Nakamoto (2008): Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System
  SEC Staff Accounting Bulletin SAB 121 (2022): Custodied Digital Assets
  FASB ASU 2023-08: Crypto Assets (fair value measurement, Dec 2023)
  BIS Working Paper 1013: DeFi Lending (2022)
  OCC Interpretive Letter 1170: National Bank Authority to Hold Digital Assets
  Basel Committee BCBS d545: Prudential Treatment of Cryptoasset Exposures
  CFA Institute (2024): Digital Asset Portfolio Management Best Practices
  AICPA Practice Aid: Accounting for Digital Assets (2023)

  SCENARIO: ht_v18_4m_derive_scn01   CONTRACTS: 5   ZERO CODE CHANGES.

exec: console.log('PHASE 0: Asset-Only ACTUS Run — Derive BTC sells + cash timeline');

item.name: 0.6 Run Phase 0: BTC CLM + 3 T-bills → capture events & derive

exec: console.log('━ PHASE 0.6: Extracting ACTUS events from 4 asset contracts');
// 1. Extract BTC sell PP events from CLM
// CLM PP payoff > 0 means BTC was SOLD → proceeds flow to cash
// For CASH-PAM ScheduledCashFlowModel: use NEGATIVE amountUSD
// so that NP INCREASES (matching mirror model convention)
// signal = amountUSD/NP = negative → NP -= negative*NP → NP increases
console.log('  ⚠ BTC CLM not found in response');
console.log('  ✅ CAPTURED TBILL MD: ' + cid + ' ' + timeStr.substring(0,10)
//    Same pattern as SC_CASH_RESERVE in stablecoin4 fix1
// Cash-affecting events with ABSOLUTE dollar amounts
cashEvents.sort(function(a,b) { return a.time < b.time ? -1 : a.time > b.time ? 1 : 0; });
cashTimeline.push({ time: mt + 'T00:00:00', value: Math.round(initialCash + cumInflows) });
// 4. Store all derived data in collection variables
console.log('  ━ DERIVED BTC SELL SCHEDULE (for scf_btc_proceeds):');
console.log('  ━ DERIVED TBILL MATURITY SCHEDULE (for scf_tbill_flows):');
console.log('  Phase 0 derive complete. ' + btcSells.length + ' BTC sells + '
pm.test('BTC CLM has non-zero PP events (sells occurred)', function() {
console.log('✅ BTC CLM non-zero PP events: ' + ppNZ.length + ' (expect ≥2 sells)');

item.name: ══ PHASE 1: Register Derived Data + Supporting Models ══
1.1 Register DERIVED indexes + SCF models (pre-req) + lb_tr01 (body)

exec: // Phase 1 pre-request: Register ALL derived data from Phase 0
// Pattern: same as stablecoin4 fix1 Phase 1A.1 pre-request
console.error('❌ Phase 0 must run first — derived data not found');
if (err) { console.error('❌ HT_CASH_BALANCE registration failed: ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ HT_CASH_BALANCE: DERIVED from Phase 0 ACTUS events (' + cashBalBody.data.length + ' points)'); }
if (err) { console.error('❌ scf_btc_proceeds registration failed: ' + err); }
else { console.log('✅ scf_btc_proceeds: DERIVED BTC sell schedule (' + btcSchedule.length + ' flows)'); }
else { console.log('✅ OUTFLOWS_01: Operational outflows (budget data, 9 points)'); }
// ── 4. TBILL_MATURITY_SCHEDULE Reference Index (DERIVED from Phase 0 MD events) ──
else { console.log('✅ TBILL_MAT_01: DERIVED from Phase 0 T-bill MD events (' + tbillMatData.length + ' points)'); }
else { console.log('✅ scf_tbill_flows: DERIVED T-bill maturity inflows (' + tbillScfSchedule.length + ' flows)'); }
console.log('━ Phase 1 complete: 1 DERIVED RI + 2 DERIVED SCF + 2 market RI + 1 LB');
console.log('  6 RI: BTC_SPOT, NAV, HURDLE, CASH_BAL(derived), OUTFLOWS, TBILL_MAT(derived)');
console.log('✅ lb_tr01: minBuffer=' + d.minBufferUSD + ' targetBuffer=' + d.targetBufferUSD);
// Verify NO mirror model in descriptors
